message:
docs(readme): retarget Live 3D Point Cloud link to hosted demo

Now that ADR-094 is deployed, point the README's demo link at
https://ruvnet.github.io/RuView/pointcloud/ instead of the
docs/readme-details.md anchor. Matches the pattern of the sibling
Observatory and Pose Fusion demo links.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch: @@ -108,7 +108,7 @@ node scripts/mincut-person-counter.js --port 5006 # Correct person counting  |  ▶ Dual-Modal Pose Fusion Demo  |  - ▶ Live 3D Point Cloud + ▶ Live 3D Point Cloud > The [server](#-quick-start) is optional for visualization and aggregation — the ESP32 [runs independently](#esp32-s3-hardware-pipeline) for presence detection, vital signs, and fall alerts. >
